data.title: Seabourn's "Explore More Event" offers up to 15% savings and $1,000 shipboard credit on luxury voyages from 2026-2028.
data.description: Luxury cruise and expedition travel leader Seabourn recently announced their annual "Explore More Event," which will showcase remarkable discounts and deals on the majority of their worldwide ocean voyages and expeditions planned for 2026 through 2028. This exclusive event will cover trips to various destinations such as Alaska, Antarctica, Japan, and more. Don't miss out on the chance to save big on these incredible travel experiences.

data.title: CooperCompanies appoints Colleen Jay as new Chair of the Board effective January 2, 2026. Strategic review launched for shareholder value.
data.description: In San Ramon, California, on December 4, 2025, CooperCompanies, a prominent medical device company listed on Nasdaq under COO, revealed that Colleen Jay will take over as Chair following the retirement of Robert Weiss on January 2, 2026. Weiss will continue on the Board and seek reelection one last time. Additionally, the company disclosed a strategic review to pinpoint ways to boost long-term shareholder value.

data.title: AlphaTime Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: ATMC) and HCYC Holding Company announce that the Registration Statement for their proposed Business Combination is now effective.
data.description: In New York City, on December 4, 2025, AlphaTime Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: ATMC) and HCYC Holding Company disclosed the successful approval of the registration statement on Form F-4 in relation to the planned business amalgamation. AlphaTime, a special purpose acquisition company, partnered with HCYC, an intermediary insurance brokerage firm, to announce this development. The registration statement's amendment marks a pivotal moment in the commencement of the proposed business consolidation.

data.title: Polestar to change ADS ratio from 1:1 to 1:30 on 9 Dec 2025.
data.description: Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY) in Gothenburg, Sweden, has revealed that changes to the ratio of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) to ordinary shares will take effect on 9 December 2025. This adjustment impacts the Company's Class A, Class B, Class C-1, and Class C-2 ADSs in relation to their corresponding ordinary shares. The announcement marks a significant shift for shareholders and investors, with the Effective Date set for the specified timeline.

data.title: Lincoln Financial names Nilanjan Adhya as EVP, Chief AI, Data and Analytics Officer effective Jan 9, 2026.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, Lincoln Financial revealed the appointment of Nilanjan (Neel) Adhya as the Executive Vice President and Chief AI, Data, and Analytics Officer (CAIDAO), starting from January 9, 2026. This role was newly established to enhance AI and data as fundamental capabilities within the enterprise. Adhya, who previously held the position of Chief Digital Officer and Global Head of Digi since 2021, will be reporting directly to Ellen Cooper, the Chairman, President, and CEO. Additionally, Adhya will become a member of Lincoln's Senior Management Committee. Lincoln Financial is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LNC.

data.title: Samsara Q3 FY26: $416M revenue, 29% YoY growth. $1.75B ending ARR, 29% YoY growth. 105M net new ARR, 24% YoY.
data.description: In San Francisco, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) revealed robust financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026. The period showcased $416 million in Q3 revenue, marking a 29% year-over-year growth. Additionally, the company reported $1.75 billion in ending Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), which also grew by 29% year-over-year. Samsara gained $105 million in net new ARR, representing a 24% year-over-year increase. The quarter saw a record-breaking 219 additions of customers with ARR exceeding $100,000 and tied a quarterly record with 17 additions of customers surpassing $1 million in ARR. Notably, 20% of the net new Annual Contract Value (ACV) was attributed to new customers.

data.title: FDA removes partial clinical hold on Vanda Pharmaceuticals' Tradipitant for motion sickness, protocol now allows more than 90 doses - Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: A pharmaceutical company, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VNDA), disclosed today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has removed the partial clinical hold on protocol VP-VLY-686-3403. The hold previously restricted the protocol to a maximum of 90 doses.

data.title: Ecolab raises quarterly cash dividend by 12% to $0.73 per share, with a new annual cash dividend of $2.92 in 2026.
data.description: Ecolab Inc.'s board of directors in St. Paul, Minnesota, announced a 12% rise in the quarterly cash dividend to $0.73 per common share. The payment is scheduled for January 15, 2026, for shareholders of record on December 16, 2025. This raise brings the new annual cash dividend to $2.92 per share in 2026, marking Ecolab's 34th consecutive annual increase. The company has a history of issuing cash dividends on its common stock for 89 consecutive years.

data.title: Motorola Solutions CFO Jason Winkler to speak at Barclays Global Tech Conference on Dec 11, 2025, 1:20pm PST. Live webcast link provided.
data.description: Motorola Solutions, a top player in public safety and enterprise security, declared that Jason Winkler, EVP and CFO, will join the Barclays Global Technology Conference on December 11, 2025, at 1:20 p.m. PST. The event will be live-streamed and available for replay on Motorola Solutions’ Investor Relations website.

data.title: KNOT Offshore Partners LP reported total revenues of $96.9 million, net income of $15.1 million, and $125.2 million available liquidity for Q3 2025.
data.description: In Aberdeen, Scotland, KNOT Offshore Partners LP (NYSE: KNOP) released its financial highlights for the third quarter of 2025. During this period, the Partnership recorded total revenues of $96.9 million, with an operating income of $30.7 million and net income of $15.1 million. The Adjusted EBITDA stood at $61.6 million. As of September 30, 2025, they reported available liquidity of $125.2 million, including cash and equivalents.

data.title: Pacific Coast Oil Trust reports no Nov. 26, 2025 cash distribution as per Sept. 2025 net profit calculations.
data.description: In Houston, today, PACIFIC COAST OIL TRUST (OTC–ROYTL) shared news that there will be no cash distribution for unit holders recorded on November 26, 2025. This decision is based on the Trust’s assessment of net profits for September 2025 as outlined in the net profits interests and overriding royalty interest Conveyance.

data.title: BlackRock predicts AI investment reaching $5-8 trillion by 2030, transforming US economy to AI-driven growth regime.
data.description: BlackRock Inc. is emphasizing the significance of artificial intelligence as a macro story that will shape growth, inflation, and market leadership for the coming years. The asset manager predicts that global AI capital expenditure could amass $5 trillion to $8 trillion by 2030, with the U.S. leading this investment surge. This shift towards AI-driven capital-intensive regimes is expected to sustain economic growth despite a slowdown in hiring and traditional business cycle indicators weakening. The increased spending on AI, while beneficial for growth, is also resulting in higher debt levels, greater rate sensitivity, and pricing pressures. BlackRock believes this AI buildout could outpace past technological revolutions.

data.title: LPL Financial marks 15 years as public company with Nasdaq bell ringing; went public on Nov 18, 2010, reshaping wealth management landscape.
data.description: Since it became a publicly traded company on November 18, 2010, LPL has significantly influenced the wealth management sector with its focus on prioritizing advisors.

data.title: Mike Vander Velde appointed as VP of Learning and Development at Blue Ridge Associates. Leading provider of ESOP services based in Virginia.
data.description: A seasoned professional in the industry has been appointed to oversee learning and development efforts aimed at advancing the enterprise's comprehensive professional growth strategy. The announcement was made by Blue Ridge Associates, a prominent provider of ESOP and retirement plan administration and compliance services based in Charlottesville, Virginia, on December 4, 2025. This move is part of the company's focus on enhancing employee skills and driving organizational development.

data.title: JBT Marel Corp declared $0.10 per share dividend payable on Dec 29, 2025, at record date Dec 15, 2025. A leading food tech solutions provider.
data.description: Chicago-based company JBT Marel Corporation (JBTM) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for its outstanding common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on December 29, 2025, to shareholders of record as of December 15, 2025. JBTM, listed on both the NYSE and Nasdaq Iceland under the ticker symbol JBTM, specializes in providing technology solutions to the food and beverage industry. This corporation is recognized as a key player in delivering innovative advancements to high-value sectors within the food and beverage market.

data.title: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) declares $0.45 quarterly dividend for period Oct 1 - Dec 31, 2025; payable on Jan 8, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement independent of identified source, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) shared that their Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 for each common stock share for the period covering October 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. This dividend is set to be distributed on January 8, 2026, to stockholders recorded as of December 17, 2025. VICI Properties Inc. is recognized as an S&P 500® experiential real estate investment trust.

data.title: DMG Blockchain Solutions releases AI strategy update and preliminary November operational results.
data.description: The recent report reveals that a new record number of 5,000 COVID-19 cases were reported in the last 24 hours. This increase brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 100,000. Additionally, there are currently 1,500 patients in critical condition requiring hospitalization. The government is implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including the enforcement of mandatory mask-wearing in public places and limitations on social gatherings. Officials are urging the public to adhere to these guidelines to prevent further escalation of the pandemic.
